title: Nature's Spirit - Farmer's Delight Recipe Compat
description: 【Discontinued】Adds recipe compatibility between Nature's Spirit and Farmer's Delight
body:
# **This datapack is discontinued.** 

**Use [ Nature's Delight ](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-delight) instead!**

Every Compat can also be used if you're looking for recipe compat.

## Description
This is a datapack that provides compatibilities between [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) by adding a series of recipes.

**v0.1.0+ requires [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated).**
## Features
Recipes added by the datapack are as follows:
- Bark stripping recipes for all the woods and logs in the mod, including Joshua Bundle;
- All the small flowers can be cut into dyes like vanilla flowers;
- You can tear doors, trapdoors and signs into planks;
- ...and more!
